pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing the migration goal to Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Bouncy Castle dependencies from the JDK 15+ artifacts to the JDK 18+ artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'jdk15on' artifacts are deprecated and may not support Java 21 features or may be removed in future releases; 'jdk18on' is the required artifact for modern JDKs.
